summary: Completed frontend testing of Östra Squad mobile football formation planner. App loads correctly with proper mobile viewport, football pitch displays with all markings, all 24 players visible in bench with photos and numbers, settings dialog works perfectly. However, drag and drop functionality is not working - players cannot be moved from bench to pitch.

critical_bugs.issue: Players cannot be dragged from bench to pitch - @dnd-kit drag events not responding to Playwright automation
critical_bugs.impact: Core functionality broken - users cannot place players on pitch
critical_bugs.technical_details: Multiple drag methods attempted (mouse events, locator.drag_to, touch events) - none successful. May be related to @dnd-kit activation constraints or touch sensor configuration.

integration_issues.issue: Player counter does not update when drag and drop fails

passed_tests: App loads correctly on mobile viewport (iPhone 390x844)
Football pitch displays with proper markings (center circle, penalty areas, goals)
All 24 players visible in bench with photos and numbers
Settings dialog opens and closes correctly
Target player count can be changed (tested 11 → 7)
Player counter displays correctly and updates with settings
Team branding (ÖSTRA SQUAD) displays correctly with green soccer ball icon
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Core UI and settings work, but main drag-and-drop feature fails

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix drag and drop functionality. The @dnd-kit implementation is not responding to automated testing. Investigate: 1) Touch sensor activation constraints (delay: 100ms, tolerance: 5px), 2) Pointer event handling, 3) DndContext collision detection settings. Consider adding debug logging to drag event handlers to troubleshoot the issue.
